name: Ubiquiti UniFi FlexHD
title: Ubiquiti UniFi FlexHD
title_extended:
4x4 MIMO on 5GHz
2x2 MIMO on 2.4GHz
2.4GHz Radio Rate - 300 Mbps
5GHz Radio Rate - 1733 Mbps
Wi-Fi Users: 200+ Users

detailed_description.heading: Compact, Versatile & Powerful
detailed_description.text: The UniFi FlexHD from Ubiquiti Networks is a uniquely designed, versatile dual-band access point that is ideal for deployment in a variety of settings, including conference halls, cafes, retail spaces, and outdoor areas. Its cylindrical form factor, slightly larger than a typical soda can, not only captures attention but also integrates seamlessly into any network environment, providing both aesthetic appeal and substantial functionality. Covering an area of up to 115 m² (1,250 ft²) and supporting over 200 connected devices, the UniFi FlexHD is an excellent choice for environments with a high density of users. The device utilizes WiFi 5 (802.11ac) technology, which is augmented by a differentiated MIMO configuration for each band it operates on. Specifically, it features a 2x2 MIMO setup on the 2.4 GHz band and a more robust 4x4 MIMO configuration on the 5 GHz band. This distinction allows the UniFi FlexHD to efficiently handle multiple data streams simultaneously across both frequency bands. The advanced MIMO configurations contribute to a total throughput of 2033 Mbps—300 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band and a significantly higher 1733 Mbps on the less congested 5 GHz band. This capability ensures that the UniFi FlexHD can effectively cater to both high-speed demands, such as streaming high-definition videos and conducting large file transfers, as well as provide longer-range connectivity where needed.

detailed_description.heading: Flexible Installation & Robust Integration
detailed_description.text: The UniFi FlexHD is designed to offer versatile mounting options that facilitate installation flush with wall or ceiling panels. This strategic placement is crucial for optimizing the distribution of the wireless signal across the designated area, thereby maximizing coverage and minimizing the impact of physical obstructions such as furniture and walls. Such installations blend seamlessly into the environment, preserving the aesthetic integrity of the space while enhancing wireless network functionality. This feature is particularly beneficial in settings like corporate offices and healthcare facilities, where maintaining a professional and unobtrusive appearance is essential while ensuring comprehensive Wi-Fi coverage.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Management with UniFi Network
detailed_description.text: The device leverages the UniFi Network, a comprehensive network management platform that offers centralized control over Ubiquiti’s UniFi devices, including routers, switches, and access points. This system simplifies the setup and ongoing management of network hardware, all accessible via the UniFi Network web application or mobile app. As a premier example of Software Defined Networking (SDN), this solution enables dynamic management of network resources, which is especially effective in both small and large-scale environments. The UniFi Controller software, which acts as the nerve center for the UniFi Network, provides an intuitive interface that allows network administrators to deploy, configure, manage, and monitor network devices seamlessly. This software simplifies complex tasks such as device detection and network visualization, and offers detailed analytics that help in making informed decisions about network management and optimization.

items.value: Wall Mount, Ceilling Mount, Pole Mount, Tabletop
